testcase.name: test_ai_chat_returns_claude_reply
testcase.failure: tests/test_neura_backend.py:70: in test_ai_chat_returns_claude_reply assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":"AI error: 'LlmChat' object has no attribute 'with_max_tokens'"} E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_create_checkout_session_pro
testcase.failure: tests/test_neura_backend.py:95: in test_create_checkout_session_pro assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":"Request req_Ru5WSE0GzvMmI4: No such price: 'price_1TaVYpGsJ0sItovxU9tZtihW'"} E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
